description: This module imports data from TCGA by taking in a GDC manifest file, downloading the files listed on that manifest, renaming them to be human-friendly, and compiling them into a GCT file to be computer-friendly.
author: Edwin F. Juarez & Andy Zhang;UCSD -- Mesirov Lab
plan:
## TCGAImporter GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
TCGAImporter is a GenePattern module that This module imports data from TCGA by taking in a GDC manifest file, downloading the files listed on that manifest, renaming them to be human-friendly, and compiling them into a GCT file to be computer-friendly.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 5 parameters:
- Required: manifest, gct, translate_gene_id, cls
- Optional: output_file_name

### 3. Command Line
```
python /usr/local/bin/TCGAImporter/download_from_manifest.py -m <manifest> -o <output_file_name> -g <gct> -t <translate_gene_id> -c <cls>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/docker-download-from-gdc\:1.5

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: manifest
parameters.description: The relative path of the manifest used to download the data. This file is obtained from the GDC data portal (https\://portal.gdc.cancer.gov/).

parameters.name: output_file_name
parameters.description: The base name to use for output files. E.g., if you type "TCGA_dataset" then the GCT file will be named "TCGA_dataset.gct"

parameters.name: gct
parameters.description: whether or not to create a gct file

parameters.name: translate_gene_id
parameters.description: Whether or not to translate ENSEMBL IDs (e.g., ENSG00000012048) to Hugo Gene Symbol (e.g., BRCA1)

parameters.name: cls
parameters.description: Whether or not to translate create a cls file separating Normal and Tumor classes based on TCGA Sample ID.
